body_transformation: The rounded head retains its pointed ears but now features smooth, iridescent scales in deep ocean blue with subtle aquamarine highlights along the ear edges. The compact body shifts to a sleek, scale-covered texture in pearly white with teal underglow, replacing the green coloration while maintaining the plump silhouette. The leaf bulb on the back transforms into a smooth, waterlogged pouch of translucent teal membrane with subtle seafoam green ripples, keeping its rounded shape. The curled tail tip gains a fin-like extension with a thin, webbed edge and a soft aquamarine glow along its length, preserving the original spiral form.
signature_feature: Back pouch: translucent teal membrane with seafoam ripples and soft aquamarine glow.
